query:
SELECT pc.id, c.name as city_name, u.username as partner_name, pc.currentProfitStage, pc.isInvestmentRecovered
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON pc.partnerId = u.id
WHERE c.name = '重庆';
